title: Rohlikpack
description: Resourcepack replacing classic bread with rohlik.
body:
The rohlíkpack brings a delightful cultural twist to Minecraft by swapping out the classic bread item with the beloved Czech pastry, rohlík. Instead of the familiar blocky loaf, players will now find themselves holding and eating a beautifully textured roll, modeled after the soft, golden-baked rohlík that’s a staple in Czech bakeries.

This pack is perfect for anyone looking to personalize their Minecraft experience with a touch of Central European charm. Whether you’re creating a Czech-inspired village, role-playing as a baker, or simply want to enjoy a more unique and appetizing food item, the rohlík fits seamlessly into the game. The detailed texture captures the subtle crust and fluffy interior of the real pastry, making it a fun and authentic addition for both Czech players and those curious about international cuisine.

Compatible with the latest versions, the rohlíkpack works well alongside other texture packs. Add a taste of tradition to your adventures and enjoy the rohlíky ^^
